title: Have you seen Razzo?
description: GEORGE NEWS - Razzo is a male ginger cat who...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Razzo is a male ginger cat who has been missing for about three weeks from his home near the golf course in Heather Park.

He could be anywhere. According to his owner, Razzo sometimes does go walkabout for a day or so, but he is not at any of the homes he usually visits.


> They are very concerned. He is sterilised, micro chipped, vaccinated and has been treated with Revolution.


"He is quite skittish and shy of people. Please keep an eye out for him. Please check any rooms not often used. Outside loos, sheds, even rooves please. He could have even gotten into a car and out in another area. Our hearts are broken."

Anyone who has seen Razzo is asked to contact Contact Brad Steenkamp on 082 563 4833.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
